name: Lulu
playstyleSummary: Lulu is a support mage who empowers her allies with shields, speed boosts, and a giant knock-up ultimate, while disrupting enemies by turning them into helpless critters. She plays from a safe distance, using her faerie companion Pix's homing bolts to add extra poke whenever her ally attacks.
strengths: Extremely strong at protecting a single ally with shields, speed, and her ultimate
Whimsy can completely shut down a dangerous enemy carry for its duration
Wild Growth's knock-up is great for starting or breaking up fights
Good poke and wave clear from Pix's bolts and Glitterlance
weaknesses: Relatively low base damage compared to other mages
Very reliant on allies committing to fights to get value from her tools
Squishy and low mobility if caught alone
Whimsy and Help, Pix! must be aimed carefully since they behave differently on allies vs. enemies

abilities.name: Pix, Faerie Companion
abilities.howToUseIt: Whenever the champion Pix is following attacks, he fires a bonus bolt at the same target - keep Pix on your ally carry so their attacks deal extra damage.

abilities.name: Glitterlance
abilities.howToUseIt: Aim carefully - moving your cursor closer to you changes the area it covers - and use it to slow multiple enemies for your team to follow up on.

abilities.name: Whimsy
abilities.howToUseIt: Cast this on an ally to speed them up for an engage or a chase, or cast it on a dangerous enemy to turn them into a critter that can't attack or cast spells.

abilities.name: Help, Pix!
abilities.howToUseIt: Send Pix to an ally to shield them and boost their attacks, or send him to an enemy to damage them and reveal their location to you.

abilities.name: Wild Growth
abilities.howToUseIt: Cast this on an ally engaging or being engaged on - it knocks up nearby enemies and gives a large Health buffer, making it great both to start fights and to save teammates.

earlyGamePlan: In lane, stay behind your ally and use Glitterlance and Pix's bolts to poke the enemy duo whenever they go for a trade. Save Whimsy for when the enemy commits hard to an all-in, since polymorphing their key threat can completely swing a fight.
quickTips: Keep Pix following the ally who fights the most for the extra poke damage
Use Whimsy on ranged attackers or dangerous champions to remove their damage during the effect
Cast Help, Pix! on ranged carries so they get the extra Pix attacks, and save Wild Growth for tankier allies to engage with
Move your cursor near yourself and Pix to widen Glitterlance's coverage
Play from behind your minions so enemies can't easily intercept Pix's bolts
Look for engage windows with Wild Growth rather than saving it purely to peel
whatToExpect: Lulu will try to poke you with Glitterlance and Pix's bolts while protecting her carry with shields and speed, and can turn you into a harmless critter with Whimsy if you commit to an all-in. Hide behind your minions to block Pix's extra attacks, and hold your engage until you know Whimsy is on cooldown so you don't get shut down mid-fight.

glossary.definition: Chipping away at an enemy's health from a safe distance before an all-in fight.
Committing all your resources to kill an enemy in a single fight, with little held back.
Starting a fight by committing to an attack on the enemy team.
Using abilities to protect an ally from being attacked, usually by slowing or blocking an enemy diver.
The ability to quickly kill a wave of minions.
A damage-focused champion whose team leans on them to win fights, usually a marksman or mage.
